raw_text:
<think>
The user asks: "packet_id=BLIND120-11A66D39D2D16C304083 status_values: route_verdict=CONTINUE repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning blocked_move=do not invent source IDs Return the three-line status record."

They want a plain text record with three key=value lines. They give fields: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. They want to start with "route_verdict=". They also gave a packet_id, but they didn't ask to include it. So they only want three lines.

Thus: "route_verdict=CONTINUE" then "repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning" then "blocked_move=do not invent source IDs". Must not include headings, etc.

Thus answer: route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

The user likely expects that. So we output exactly that.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
